title: Which Companies Are Hiring Data Engineers Right Now? (Live ATS Data)
description: Live ATS data, 2026-07-12: 39 data engineer openings at 11 companies, 46% remote, ranked and dated.
answer_first: A July 12, 2026 pull from public ATS careers boards finds 39 live data engineer openings spread over 11 employers. The single biggest hirer is OpenAI at 8 roles, while 46% of the full list is remote-friendly. This page begins its history on 2026-07-12: the baseline capture holds 39 open roles. Every opening is listed below with company, title, location, remote flag, and the date it was posted.

facts: 39 open data engineer roles were live across 11 employers on 2026-07-12.
The most active employer is OpenAI at 8 openings, ahead of Anthropic on 6.
Remote work is offered on 18 of the 39 openings - a 46% remote share.
San Francisco appears most often among listed locations, on 7 postings.
Postings are fresh: 1 roles went up in the 7 days leading to the capture.
Baseline established 2026-07-12 with 39 roles; deltas start at the next refresh.

faq.q: Where does this hiring data come from?
faq.a: From the public careers APIs that companies expose through their ATS (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby). A single automated run on 2026-07-12 matched 'data engineer' and returned 39 live roles at 11 employers; nothing is manually entered.

faq.q: Who is hiring the most data engineer roles right now?
faq.a: In this snapshot it is OpenAI, posting 8 of the 39 live roles; Anthropic is next with 6. Each refresh recounts the boards, so rankings move.

faq.q: What share of the openings allow remote work?
faq.a: 46% - that is 18 of 39 roles carrying an explicit remote flag on the source board. Per-role remote status is in the table.

faq.q: When was this hiring data last updated?
faq.a: The capture date is 2026-07-12, shown in the provenance line, and 1 roles were less than a week old at that moment. Refreshes rewrite this same page with the newest board state.
